## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any issue. -->

## Type

- [ ] New / updated skill
- [ ] New example
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Fix / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Skill stays **self-contained** — no runtime import of another skill's code
- [ ] Sources are **generated by script** — no hand-edited GUI / CAD binaries committed
- [ ] **No proprietary design** baked into a skill (worked designs go in `examples/`)
- [ ] English-only copy
- [ ] If a real build taught a lesson, it's **folded back into the skill** (living docs)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) updated if user-facing
